tools.name: keap_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts in the Keap CRM. Supports filtering, ordering, field selection, and cursor pagination (page_size / page_token). Keap: GET /contacts.

tools.name: keap_get_contact
tools.description: Get a single contact by id. Keap: GET /contacts/{contact_id}.

tools.name: keap_list_companies
tools.description: List companies in the Keap CRM. Supports filtering, ordering, field selection, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /companies.

tools.name: keap_get_company
tools.description: Get a single company by id. Keap: GET /companies/{company_id}.

tools.name: keap_list_opportunities
tools.description: List sales opportunities (deals) in the pipeline. Supports filtering, ordering, field selection, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /opportunities.

tools.name: keap_get_opportunity
tools.description: Get a single opportunity by id. Keap: GET /opportunities/{opportunity_id}.

tools.name: keap_list_tags
tools.description: List tags defined in the account (used to segment contacts). Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /tags.

tools.name: keap_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks (follow-ups / to-dos). Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /tasks.

tools.name: keap_get_task
tools.description: Get a single task by id. Keap: GET /tasks/{task_id}.

tools.name: keap_list_subscriptions
tools.description: List recurring subscriptions / payment plans. Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /subscriptions.

tools.name: keap_list_orders
tools.description: List e-commerce orders. Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /orders.

tools.name: keap_list_products
tools.description: List products in the catalog. Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /products.

tools.name: keap_list_campaigns
tools.description: List marketing campaigns (automation sequences). Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /campaigns.

tools.name: keap_list_affiliates
tools.description: List referral-program affiliates. Supports filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination. Keap: GET /affiliates.

tools.name: keap_create_contact
tools.description: CREATE a new contact in the Keap CRM. Provide any of given_name, family_name, email_addresses, phone_numbers, company_id, plus an optional `extra` object of any other Keap fields. Keap: POST /contacts.

tools.name: keap_update_contact
tools.description: UPDATE an existing contact by id. Provide any of given_name, family_name, email_addresses, phone_numbers, company_id, plus an optional `extra` object of any other Keap fields (only supplied fields are changed). Keap: PATCH /contacts/{contact_id}.

tools.name: keap_create_task
tools.description: CREATE a task (follow-up / to-do), optionally linked to a contact. Keap: POST /tasks.

tools.name: keap_apply_tag
tools.description: APPLY a tag to one or more contacts (segments them / can trigger automation). Keap: POST /tags/{tag_id}/contacts:applyTags.
